methods.title: Direct Bank Transfer
methods.description: Use these details to transfer your donation directly to the foundation account.

instructions.title: Important Instructions
instructions.body: After initiating the transfer, please email the transaction reference number with your full name and contact details so we can issue your receipt.

notices.title: Payment Methods
notices.body: We currently do not accept PayPal, credit cards, or third-party payment gateways. This keeps processing simple and transparent.

impact.body: Providing pure meals to sadhus, widows, and vulnerable residents.
Supporting medical camps and urgent care for local families.
Maintaining the cleanliness and spiritual sanctity of Yamuna ghats.

imageAlt: Warm light through temple arches in Vrindavan.
